<!--
Title format: <type>(<scope>)?!?: <subject>
Conventional Commits 1.0.0. Examples:
  feat(planner): add EARS spec generator
  fix(act): handle empty diff in subagent runner
  chore(deps): bump ruff to 0.10
-->

## Summary

<!-- 1-3 bullets. What changed and why. -->

## Linked issues

Closes #

## Type of change

- [ ] feat — new user-visible capability
- [ ] fix — bug fix
- [ ] perf — performance improvement
- [ ] refactor — internal cleanup, no behavior change
- [ ] docs — documentation only
- [ ] test — tests only
- [ ] chore / ci / build — tooling

## Test plan

- [ ] `mise run validate` passes locally
- [ ] New tests added for new behavior
- [ ] Manual verification of: …

## Risk + rollback

<!-- What could go wrong? How do we revert? -->

## Reviewer checklist

- [ ] Conventional commit subject
- [ ] No secrets, tokens, or customer data added
- [ ] Public API changes documented in CHANGELOG.md
- [ ] Coverage stayed at or above the 80% gate
